title: phalaris minor var. gracilis
intro: Phalaris minor var. gracilis, also known as lesser canary grass or common canary grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phalaris minor var. gracilis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
